name: @mizchi/moonbit-wasm-host
description: Host imports for running MoonBit-compiled wasm-gc / wasm guests under Node (V8). Mirrors moonrun: spectest.print_char (UTF-16 line buffering), __moonbit_sys_unstable.is_windows, and a minimal WASI fd_write. autoStubMissing injects noop bindings for any imports the module declares without bindings.
